title: helenium incisum
intro: Helenium incisum, also known as the narrow-leaved sneezeweed or goldenweed, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helenium incisum include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
